must_use_sequence: Resolve the governed AGENTS target with agents-payload-contract.
Load Meta-Enhance-Prompt contract and skill-directive entry before interpreting the user request.
Compress the user request into the smallest precise payload semantics only.
Edit only the governed AGENTS_machine.json payload scope.
Run collect for the same external AGENTS.md to re-render AGENTS_human.md.
Run lint for the same external AGENTS.md before closing.
hard_constraints: Do not add reminders, process notes, extra routing, or extra obligations beyond the user request.
Do not treat oral wording as permission to expand hidden intent.
Do not repeat or paraphrase skill-scoped reminders outside default_meta_skill_order once they are already recorded there.
